layman_headline: Crypto market is fearful and weak — no compelling trade setup right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a 'Fear' state with Bitcoin dominance high at 56.3%, meaning money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin. All the swing trade candidates have significant problems — either their charts are bearish, they've already bounced too much, or they lack clear catalysts. The best candidate on the watchlist is LayerZero (ZRO), which has an RSI approaching oversold territory and a fantastic risk/reward ratio near its $0.90 support, but its chart structure is still bearish and there's no news catalyst to trigger a reversal.
layman_action: Stay patient and keep cash ready. The market is scared and altcoins are bleeding. Wait for a clearer setup — either a confirmed bounce off support with volume, or a shift in market sentiment. Don't chase falling knives.
expert_reasoning: Every candidate in this cycle has material flaws. GRASS (-24.8% 7d) has a bearish engulfing pattern and poor R/R of 0.48x. BONK has the worst chart bias at -1.40 with bearish marubozu — pure selling pressure. JTO's RSI at 59 after a -20% drop is contradictory and suggests the bounce may have already played out. ETHFI has the best chart bias (+0.60) but resistance is only 2.5% away with R/R of 0.11x — terrible swing setup. ZRO stands out with RSI 31 near oversold and exceptional R/R (16.5x to resistance at $1.00 vs $0.90 support), but the overall bearish structure (below all MAs, downtrend) and high BTC dominance crushing alts makes entry premature. The prudent move is to wait for ZRO to confirm a bounce off $0.90 with volume before entering.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.3% is actively suppressing altcoin performance — alts could continue bleeding
Fear & Greed at 26 with no clear catalyst to reverse — sentiment could deteriorate further toward extreme fear
U.S. launching fresh Iran strikes creates geopolitical uncertainty that typically pressures risk assets
watch_list: ZRO price action around $0.90 support — a confirmed bounce with volume spike would trigger a BUY
Fear & Greed index movement — a drop below 20 (extreme fear) often marks excellent contrarian entry points
BTC price stability above $63,000 — if BTC breaks lower, alts will get crushed further
market_context: The crypto market is in a fearful state (F&G 26) with BTC relatively stable but altcoins bleeding heavily. Geopolitical tension from U.S.-Iran strikes and macro uncertainty around crypto IPOs stalling add headwinds, while high BTC dominance at 56.3% signals capital rotation away from alts.
context_banner: Fear dominates the market with alts in capitulation mode — patience is the highest-conviction trade right now.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 (Fear) with weekly average of 24 — sentiment is poor but slowly improving, suggesting we may be approaching a bottom but aren't there yet.
ZRO RSI at 31 is the lowest among candidates and approaching oversold territory, but hasn't crossed below 30 for a confirmed oversold signal.
U.S. launching fresh Iran strikes creates geopolitical risk headwind, and crypto IPO market stalling signals institutional caution.
Bitcoin described as 'nearing late stages of bear market' by Real Vision analyst — suggests potential macro bottom forming but not confirmed.
All altcoin candidates show bearish or neutral chart structures with poor risk/reward ratios, except ZRO which has exceptional R/R but bearish trend confirmation.
